title: Notices file v1
description: Fixed, versioned notice texts keyed to the Rewrite Report notices enum. Text data only; no logic. The engine attaches these texts per the rewrite-policy notice_rules. The 'rationale' fields are maintainer documentation and must not affect runtime behavior.

policy_version.description: Content version, YYYY.MM with an optional tag. The month is calendar-validated (01-12).

notices.description: The fixed notice texts, one per notice identity.

id.description: Stable, permanent registry key. Never reused.

notice.description: Notice identity; matches the Rewrite Report notices enum exactly.

rationale.description: Maintainer-facing documentation only; must not affect runtime behavior.
